mode: agent

# Build UI

## Description
Create responsive, accessible user interface components with modern design system and component library.

## Usage
Use this prompt to develop user interface components and pages with comprehensive design system implementation.

## Prompt
BUILD UI: [components] for [project-name]

Create responsive, accessible user interface components.

## Context
This prompt activates:
- UX Designer + Senior Developer combination
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS and modern frameworks
- Accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- Component library and design system implementation
- Animation and interaction design

## Examples
```
BUILD UI: task dashboard and forms for TaskMaster
```

```
BUILD UI: product catalog and checkout flow for EcommerceHub
```

```
BUILD UI: user profile and settings interface for SocialApp
```

## References
- #file:.github/instructions/ux-designer-agent.instructions.md
- #file:.github/instructions/senior-developer-agent.instructions.md
- #file:.github/instructions/general.instructions.md

## Expected Output
- Responsive UI components with Tailwind CSS
- Accessibility implementation (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- Component library with Storybook documentation
- Design system with consistent styling
- Interactive animations and micro-interactions
- Cross-browser compatibility testing
- Performance optimization for UI components
